results.title: Pangram Check
results.description: Write a program to check if a sentence is a pangram (contains every letter of the English alphabet at least once). Print "Pangram" or "Not a Pangram".
results.code:
# Static input
sentence = "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog"

# Convert to lowercase and remove spaces
sentence = sentence.lower()

# Set of letters in the sentence
letters = set()

for char in sentence:
    if char.isalpha():
        letters.add(char)

# Check pangram condition
if len(letters) == 26:
    print("Pangram")
else:
    print("Not a Pangram")
